expectations.evidence: term_review.md extraction summary states 'Found 109 recurring technical terms across 259 sentences' with 86 recommended glossary entries, well exceeding 80-term threshold

Correctly handles 'Planungskonfigurationsstruktur' (36x) → 'planning configuration structure' and even longer compound 'Planungskonfigurationsstrukturbibliothek' (10x) → 'planning configuration structure library'

Multiple options provided for terms (e.g., Produktionseinheit: 'production unit' vs 'production cell'; Planungsverfahren: 'planning method' vs 'scheduling procedure'; Umsetzung: 'implementation' vs 'execution, realization')
glossary.tsv exists with 94 lines containing tab-separated de→en pairs covering all major technical terms

Output explicitly recognizes this as a production planning/manufacturing/engineering patent. Includes manufacturing and process-specific vocabulary, system architecture terminology, and technical compound handling.
